title: Inquiry about Monday.com API Usage for Field Retrieval and Field Overwrite

posts.author: tina_wt_su (tinasu)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi support

I am currently working on a small tool development project that requires using Python to automatically retrieve column information from a specific Monday.com board.

Additionally, the tool needs to populate another column in Monday.com with certain values.

I kindly request guidance regarding which APIs I should utilize to accomplish these tasks successfully. Any relevant information, documentation, or resources you can provide would be highly appreciated.

Thank you for your attention and assistance.

Best regards,
tina

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @tina_wt_su and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can follow this article on how to get data from the column values.

You can follow this article on how to populate column values using the API.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
